info.name: Repetio Flashcards
info.summary: Study Markdown flashcards with SM-2 spaced repetition
info.description:
# Repetio Flashcards
A file-based spaced repetition flashcard app for Nextcloud.
## Key Principle **Your `.md` files are the single source of truth.** Cards, scheduling metadata, and translations all live in standard Markdown spaced-repetition files stored in your Nextcloud Files — no database lock-in and no vendor-specific card database.
## Features - **File-based storage** — cards stored in `.md` files, compatible with Markdown spaced-repetition tools - **SM-2 algorithm** — intelligent review scheduling written back into `.md` files - **Card formats** — Basic (`word:::translation`), Cloze (`==word==^[hint]`), transcriptions - **Auto-save** — changes buffered in memory, flushed to `.md` every 10 seconds - **Text-to-Speech** — Edge TTS backend + Web Speech API browser fallback - **Study statistics** — due forecast, interval distribution, per-deck breakdown - **Git conflict resolution** — auto-resolves merge conflicts in SR tags - **Dark / light theme** — follows Nextcloud theme automatically - **Keyboard shortcuts** — Space to reveal, 1–5 to rate - **Multilingual** — English, Russian, Serbian
info.author: Artem (DreamThemeGH)
